note: Vectors from 50 USC §3937 SCRA. Known constants: 6% rate cap; excess FORGIVEN not deferred per §3937(a)(2). golden_hash empty until golden-parity --update.

vectors.name: rate_8pct_200_delta_forgiven
vectors.description: Pre-service loan 8% 12mo $10k: excess 2pp over 6% cap = $200 forgiven per 50 USC §3937(a)(2). Known: 6% SCRA cap.

output_payload.scra_note: Per 50 USC §3937(a)(2), excess interest above 6% must be forgiven -- creditor may not collect deferred excess after active duty ends. This is not a deferral.
output_payload.regulatory_basis: 50 USC §3937 (SCRA); formerly Soldiers and Sailors Civil Relief Act 50 USC §527; DoD Financial Management Regulation 7000.14-R Vol 7A Chapter 40
output_payload.table_source: 50 USC §3937 (SCRA codified 2003, Pub. L. 108-189 Dec 19 2003); 50 USC §3937(a)(1) 6% annual rate cap; 50 USC §3937(a)(2) excess forgiven not deferred; 50 USC §3937(d) 180-day notice requirement
output_payload.pii_note: All inputs are processed locally in your browser. No data is transmitted.

vectors.name: rate_4pct_within_cap_no_excess
vectors.description: Pre-service loan 4% 6mo $20k: below 6% cap -- no violation, zero excess, zero delta.

output_payload.scra_note: Per 50 USC §3937(a)(2), excess interest above 6% must be forgiven -- creditor may not collect deferred excess after active duty ends. This is not a deferral.
output_payload.regulatory_basis: 50 USC §3937 (SCRA); formerly Soldiers and Sailors Civil Relief Act 50 USC §527; DoD Financial Management Regulation 7000.14-R Vol 7A Chapter 40
output_payload.table_source: 50 USC §3937 (SCRA codified 2003, Pub. L. 108-189 Dec 19 2003); 50 USC §3937(a)(1) 6% annual rate cap; 50 USC §3937(a)(2) excess forgiven not deferred; 50 USC §3937(d) 180-day notice requirement
output_payload.pii_note: All inputs are processed locally in your browser. No data is transmitted.

vectors.name: empty_input_finite
vectors.description: Empty inputs return finite zero-state (rate 0%, no violation).

output_payload.regulatory_basis: 50 USC §3937 (SCRA); formerly Soldiers and Sailors Civil Relief Act 50 USC §527; DoD Financial Management Regulation 7000.14-R Vol 7A Chapter 40
output_payload.table_source: 50 USC §3937 (SCRA, codified 2003); 50 USC §3937(a)(1) 6% rate cap; 50 USC §3937(a)(2) excess forgiven not deferred; Pub. L. 108-189 §108-189 (Dec 19, 2003)
output_payload.pii_note: All inputs are processed locally in your browser. No data is transmitted.
